mapper.sql: id, org_name, org_id, building_name, house_id, room_num, meter_name, specification, model, meter_serial, meter_num, card_num, concentrator_code, hoard_limit, alarm_value, close_value, install_site, opened_time, standard_id, standard_name, standard_price, start_reading, current_reading, total_used, trade_times, total_money, total_recharge, current_balance, company_id, create_by, type, create_time, imei, product_id, device_id
mapper.insert:
insert into pr_import_valve (org_name, building_name, room_num, meter_name, meter_serial, meter_num, card_num, concentrator_code, caliber, company_id, create_by, type, create_time, imei, dtu_num, dtu_type, chan_num, device_id, install_type, is_command, command_meter_name) values
(#{item.orgName}, #{item.buildingName}, trim(#{item.roomNum}), #{item.meterName}, #{item.meterSerial}, trim(#{item.meterNum}), trim(#{item.cardNum}), #{item.concentratorCode}, #{item.caliber}, #{item.companyId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.type}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.imei}, #{item.dtuNum}, #{item.dtuType}, #{item.chanNum}, #{item.deviceId}, #{item.installType}, #{item.isCommand}, #{item.commandMeterName})
mapper.update: update pr_import_valve a left join pr_house b on a.room_num = b.room_num set a.house_id = b.id, a.org_id = b.org_id where a.company_id = #{companyId} and a.type = '0' and a.create_by = #{create} and b.company_id = #{companyId} and b.del_flag = '0' and a.room_num = b.room_num and a.building_name = b.building_name and a.org_name = b.org_name

update pr_import_valve a left join mt_meter_match b on a.company_id = b.company_id left join mt_tc_valve mha on b.archive_id = mha.id set a.meter_arc_code = mha.code, a.archive_id = mha.id where a.company_id = #{companyId} and a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0' and b.meter_type = '31' and a.meter_name = mha.name

update pr_import_valve a left join mt_meter_match b on a.company_id = b.company_id left join mt_tc_valve mha on b.archive_id = mha.id set a.command_meter_arc_code = mha.code, a.command_archive_id = mha.id where a.company_id = #{companyId} and a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0' and b.meter_type = '31' and a.command_meter_name = mha.name and a.is_command = '是'
mapper.select: select from pr_import_valve where company_id = #{companyId} and type = '0' and create_by = #{create} and (house_id is null or org_id is null) limit 500
select * from pr_import_valve where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and (meter_num is null or meter_num = '') limit 500
select from pr_import_valve where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and archive_id is null limit 500

select a.* from pr_import_valve a left join pr_heat_valve_archive b on a.house_id = b.house_id where a.company_id = #{companyId} and a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0' and a.house_id = b.house_id and b.is_changed = '0' limit 500

select a.* from pr_import_valve a left join pr_heat_valve_archive b on a.meter_arc_code = b.meter_arc_code and a.meter_num = b.meter_num where a.company_id = #{companyId} and a.create_by = #{create} and a.type = '0' and a.meter_arc_code = b.meter_arc_code and a.meter_num = b.meter_num and b.is_changed = '0' limit 500
mapper.insert: insert into pr_heat_valve_archive (id, company_id, org_id, house_id, archive_id, meter_arc_code, meter_arc_name, meter_num, card_num, dtu_num, dtu_type, chan_num, device_id, meter_serial, concentrator_code, caliber, install_type, imei_num, create_by, create_time) select replace(uuid(), '-', ''), company_id, org_id, house_id, archive_id, meter_arc_code, meter_name, meter_num, card_num, dtu_num, dtu_type, chan_num, device_id, meter_serial, concentrator_code, caliber, install_type, imei, create_by, create_time from pr_import_valve where company_id = #{companyId} and create_by = #{create} and type = '0' and house_id is not null and archive_id is not null
